function.name: resolveToolApproval
function.description: Resolve a pending tool-authorization request after the user has replied. Use this only when the conversation context already contains a pending approval request and you have enough information to decide whether the user approved or rejected it. If the user's intent is still unclear, ask a follow-up question with askUser instead of guessing.

ApprovalId.description: The approval_id of the pending authorization request.

Decision.description: Whether the user approved or rejected the pending tool call.
